rows.notes: Padron portfolio — Rare outlier — ONLY Padron with Connecticut Shade — creamy, light, peppery. — Sub-line override: do not inherit Padron Full-body defaults.
rows.wrapperRole: Connecticut Shade wrapper — sole mild Padron — cream and soft pepper.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler — medium body, creamy, approachable.
rows.flavorNotes: cream, cedar, white pepper, nuts, light sweetness
rows.bestFor: Creamy lattes, white Burgundy, pilsners, Padron contrast wildcard vs 1926/1964 maduro.
rows.avoidIf: User wants full Nicaraguan puro power, 1926 pepper bomb, or maduro sweetness only.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when user wants Padron prestige with Connecticut mildness — creamy wildcard in Padron-only flights.
rows.catalogLine: Padron Damaso Robusto · 5¼ × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Nicaragua · $14 · Notes: cream, cedar, white pepper
rows.memberBlurb: Padron Damaso — the only Connecticut Shade Padron; creamy wildcard in an all-Padron flight.
rows.sizeNote: Sterlon sub-line: Medium body only — never treat as Full like 1926.
